hard_gates.requirement: Binds dry-run Codex-managed scope, excludes P00-000_INBOX from automatic project sync, and records refresh as requested but not actually attempted.
Uses only whitelisted sent/received metadata, deterministic fingerprints, direction, and bounded matching bases; no body, HTML, attachment payload/name, secret, or hidden path basis.
Suppresses the exact sent duplicate, routes the ambiguous sent row to owner follow-up, and performs no ledger write in dry-run mode.
Classifies received discrepancies without deleting or rewriting received history and does not mutate mail, folder tree, categories, or rules.
Outputs metadata-only deltas, reports, counts/refs/receipts, and a conservative boundary/claim review; readable export is not source truth.
No false Outlook/preflight execution claim, runtime absolute path, raw mail payload, golden/candidate leakage, or fabricated file read.

dimensions.full_credit: Scope, exclusions, date/mode, and honest refresh status are explicit.
Allowed fields and deterministic fingerprints are handled correctly.
Duplicate prevention, project matching, ambiguity, and dry-run semantics are correct.
Deltas, reports, owner follow-up, receipts, hashes/refs, and summary are usable.
Metadata-only and Outlook authority boundaries are clear and concise.

no_golden_attestation: Derived only from current workflow.yaml and step_graph.yaml.
